summary.zh-CN: AI 会议速记与研究派发
summary.en: AI meeting transcription with research dispatch

description.zh-CN: 实时录音流式转写 + 服务端声纹聚类区分说话人 + 滚动窗口总结要点 + 自动识别研究任务并派发给 EchoAgent 执行。
description.en: Real-time streaming transcription, speaker diarization via voiceprint clustering, rolling-window summarization, and automatic research-task dispatch to EchoAgent.
